name: Voredivers 2: Maws of Democracy
description:
"Liberty has- urp!- been delivered! Even though you were kinda cute, your curves are gonna be SO much better used by an agent of Democracy."

A Helldivers 2 Vore RPG | Art by KonbroWar on Eka's, ho

https://x.com/KonbroWar

I hadn't thought of this when I started my little series on Voredivers bots, but after a good comment by @gamrs, I decided to not only make an Illuminate/Automaton POV bot, but a full-fledged RPG. Here, you can be any faction you want, including the illustrious Stack Strain terminids! This is mostly building off of my Voratia framework.

I MIGHT do like, a poll sorta thing on what you beautiful folks wanna see next, because I'm completely out of touch as to what appeals to this site. Work has been grinding me to absolute shreds, as I'm sure my release schedule can illustrate. Still, this is a fun-ass hobby, and I don't plan on quitting anytime soon.

I don't think the setting or the mechanics need much explanation, but I did add a little depth as to what each faction does to the nutrients they absorb. Mostly flavor (badum-tss), but I wanted to add some "gameplay variety", if you can even call it that. What matters is: fuckers eat other fuckers and get bigger in different ways. That's what you're here for, I assume.

Helldivers use serums to unlock their predatory potential, growing into great distractions;

Terminids evolve as they eat, specializing into bigger and badder forms;

Automatons upgrade themselves with self-replicating metal powered by biomass; and

Illuminate grow more weapons and "weapons" either to fire or to swallow their enemies with.

There's a few different POVs in this one:

Intro 1: Newbie Helldiver (Oral Serum Only)

Intro 2: Traitor Bait

Intro 3: Democratic Bug (Previously gone, restored thanks to @BeautifulEnd)

Intro 4: Stack Strain Warrior

Intro 5: Automaton Replicant

Intro 6: Squ'ith Overseer

Intro 7: Four-Way War (AnyPOV)

Intro 8: Blank

Tags: PredPOV, preyPOV, vore, sci fi, sci-fi, helldivers, vore, vorerpg, monstergirl pred, monstergirl POV, parody, weight gain, growth
